description: Detects C# classes with too many methods, properties, or fields (god class anti-pattern). Simplified from Rust: flags all class_declaration nodes. Cannot apply method/field count thresholds (>10 methods or >15 fields), exclude controllers or partial classes, or graduate severity by excess. Structural detection only.

flag.message: Class detected -- verify it does not have too many methods/properties/fields (threshold: 10 methods, 15 fields). Consider splitting into smaller classes.
